prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of UBER stock, I used typical short-term volatility patterns for large-cap tech stocks. UBER typically exhibits daily volatility of 2-4%. The point estimate assumes no directional bias over such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are based on assumed daily standard deviation of ~1.5%, scaled for 2 days using square root of time rule, then applying normal distribution z-scores: 50% CI (±0.67σ), 80% CI (±1.28σ), 90% CI (±1.65σ).
